member.name: T:Aioi.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Aioi.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Aioi.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: M:Aioi.FelicaCommand.GetBlockData(System.Byte[])
member.summary: gets block data from felica response packet

member.name: P:Aioi.NfcAdapter.RetryCount
member.summary: Sets or gets the retry count.

member.name: E:Aioi.SmartTag.ShowMessage
member.summary: log event to write to form

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.IsSmartTag(System.Byte[])
member.returns: True if the IDm is the smart-tag; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.WaitForIdle
member.summary: Waits until smart-tag can do a next task.

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.SendCommand(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sends a command to the smart-tag.

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.SendCommand(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sends a command to the smart-tag.

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.ReadData(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a command from the smart-tag.

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.ReadData(System.Int32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Reads a command from the smart-tag.

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.WriteUserData(System.Int32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes the user data to the free information area on the smart-tag. Divides and sends the command into some frames if necessary.

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.WriteUserDataByFrame(System.Int32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes the user data up to 512-bytes.

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.ReadUserData(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads the user data in the free information area on the smart-tag.

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.ReadUserDataByBlock(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads the user data in the free information area on the smart-tag. (Maximum concurrent transfer block number below)

member.name: M:Aioi.SmartTag.ConvertTo3Bytes(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts two 12-bit numbers to the 3-bytes array.
